module_info.docstring:
Detect project domains using signals from flux-drive domain index.

Scans directories, files, build-system dependencies, and source keywords
to classify a project into one or more domains (e.g. game-simulation,
web-api, ml-pipeline).  Results are cached at {PROJECT}/.claude/intersense.yaml.

Exit codes:
    0  Domains detected (or cache is fresh when --check-stale)
    1  No domains detected (first scan: caller may use LLM fallback; staleness check: skip generation)
    2  Fatal error
    3  Cache is stale (structural changes detected) — only with --check-stale
    4  No cache exists — only with --check-stale

functions.name: load_index
functions.docstring: Load domain definitions from index.yaml.

functions.name: compute_structural_hash
functions.docstring:
Compute deterministic hash of structural files.

For each file in sorted(STRUCTURAL_FILES):
  - If file exists: sha256(file_contents)
  - If file missing: sentinel "__absent__"
Concatenate "filename:hash\n" pairs, hash the result.
Returns "sha256:{hex}" prefixed string.

functions.name: read_cache
functions.docstring: Read existing cache file. Returns None if absent or unparseable.

functions.name: write_cache
functions.docstring:
Write detection results as YAML cache with atomic rename.

Uses temp-file-and-rename pattern to prevent corruption from
interrupted writes.

functions.name: _parse_iso_datetime
functions.docstring: Parse an ISO 8601 datetime string, returning None on failure.

functions.name: _check_stale_tier1
functions.docstring:
Tier 1: Structural hash comparison (<100ms).

Returns:
    0 if hash matches (fresh)
    3 if hash differs (stale)
    None if hash missing from cache (try next tier)

functions.name: _check_stale_tier2
functions.docstring:
Tier 2: Git log check (<500ms).

Returns:
    0 if no structural changes since detection (fresh)
    3 if structural changes found (stale)
    None if git unavailable (try next tier)

functions.name: _check_stale_tier3
functions.docstring:
Tier 3: Mtime fallback for non-git projects.

Returns:
    0 if no structural files newer than detection (fresh)
    3 if any structural file is newer (stale)

functions.name: check_stale
functions.docstring:
Check if cached domain detection is stale.

Returns exit code:
    0 — cache is fresh (or override: true)
    3 — cache is stale
    4 — no cache exists

functions.name: gather_directories
functions.docstring: Fraction of directory signals that exist under project root.

functions.name: gather_files
functions.docstring: Fraction of file-pattern signals matching in project root + 1-level subdirs.

functions.name: _parse_package_json_deps
functions.docstring: Extract dependency names from package.json.

functions.name: _parse_cargo_toml_deps
functions.docstring: Extract dependency names from Cargo.toml.

functions.name: _parse_go_mod_deps
functions.docstring: Extract module paths from go.mod require block.

functions.name: _parse_pyproject_deps
functions.docstring: Extract dependency names from pyproject.toml.

functions.name: _parse_requirements_txt
functions.docstring: Extract package names from requirements.txt.

functions.name: gather_frameworks
functions.docstring: Fraction of framework signals found in build-system dependency lists.

functions.name: gather_keywords
functions.docstring: Fraction of keyword signals found in up to *limit* source files.

functions.name: score_domain
functions.docstring: Compute weighted average across signal categories.

functions.name: detect
functions.docstring: Run detection and return list of detected domain dicts.
